title: Update Settings
description: Configure the Google Maps Leads Scraper parameters

content.introduction: Configure the scraper parameters to control how places are collected. These settings include language, location context, filters, and optional data collection features.

scraperParams.title: Scraper Parameters
scraperParams.content: Set these parameters in the `params` object:

rows.description: Regional context for search results (e.g., `United States`)
Language for place names and metadata (e.g., `English (United States)`)
Maximum places to collect before task ends
Visit business website to extract email, Facebook, Instagram, and additional phone
Collect all image URLs from the Google Place page
Collect additional metadata like plus_code, poi, health, and last_opening_hours_updated_at

proTips.content: Enabling `collect_contacts`, `images`, or `details` may incur additional credits.
Set `export_unique_results: true` to avoid duplicate entries when places appear multiple times in search results.

seo.title: Update Settings - Google Maps Leads Scraper - lobstr.io API
seo.description: Configure the Google Maps Leads Scraper parameters including filters, language, and data collection options.
